---
title: ""
listing:
  id: posts-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, author, description, categories]
  max-items: 3
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <h1>Hi, I'm Mahamadi NIKIEMA</h1>
  <p>ML Engineer writing about machine learning, LLMs, and data engineering.</p>
  <div class="hero-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/MNIKIEMA" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
      <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
    </a>
    <a href="https://x.com/MahamadiN" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
      <i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> Twitter
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahamadi-nikiema/" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
      <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
    </a>
    <a href="https://huggingface.co/madoss" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
      🤗 Hugging Face
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

<div class="latest-posts">

## Latest Posts

::: {#posts-listing}
:::

<a href="blog.html" class="see-all">See all posts →</a>

</div>
